\tzpentry{ID3885}{Chemical Potential Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3885 introduces Chemical Potential Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} h_{\mu\nu}^{\text{rot}} = \frac{1}{c^2}\begin{pmatrix} (\boldsymbol{\omega} \times \mathbf{r})^2 & -(\boldsymbol{\omega} \times \mathbf{r})^T \\ -(\boldsymbol{\omega} \times \mathbf{r}) & \mathbf{0}_{3\times3} \end{pmatrix} + \frac{2G}{c^3}\int_{\mathcal{V}} \frac{\rho(\mathbf{r}')[\boldsymbol{\omega} \times (\mathbf{r} - \mathbf{r}')]}{|\mathbf{r} - \mathbf{r}'|^3} d^3r' \end{equation}
